title: Mondoro Heat Wave
lead: Mondoro is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.66. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Mondoro is causing significant disruptions. 
 The high temperature is resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 15.3 GG, while the Humidity is at 43% and wind speed is 23.3 km/h. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG further emphasizes the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
